prompt: Full 6-Activity Phase Anatomy: INPUT -> GENERATE (requirements-analyst 9-step) -> QUALITY GATE (separate quality-gate-validator) -> HUMAN REVIEW -> REFINEMENT -> APPROVAL + KC (traceability + knowledge capture)
assertions: User Story IDs match US-XXX-XXX format
At least 3 ACs per user story
NFRs have measurable thresholds with NFR-XXX-XXX IDs
Test skeleton IDs match T-AC-XXX format
Traceability matrix links PRD -> Story -> AC -> Test with no orphans
Step 3: Separate QG verdict file with QG-REQ-* ID and per-criterion PASS/WARN/FAIL
Step 3: QG is clearly separate agent role (not self-check)
Step 6: Knowledge capture file exists with phase learnings
Step 6: Traceability update confirmed with phase completion marker
changes_from_iteration_1: Added 5 new assertions for Steps 3-6 of Phase Anatomy (previously only tested Step 2)
Eval prompt explicitly demands all 6 anatomy steps
QG must be a SEPARATE file/agent, not embedded self-check
Knowledge capture and traceability confirmation required
